title.zh: 梯度 / 散度 / 旋度交互可视化实验台 v7
title.en: Gradient / Divergence / Curl Interactive Lab v7

description.zh: 用颜色场、等势线、动态粒子和矢量箭头观察标量场与向量场，并点击采样点读取梯度、散度和旋度。
description.en: Explore scalar and vector fields with contours, particles, arrows, and point sampling for gradient, divergence, and curl.

imageUrl: images/梯度_散度_旋度交互可视化实验台_v7.png

title.zh: 三维标量场 f(x,y,z) 可调分辨率与点云密度实验台
title.en: 3D Scalar Field Resolution and Point Cloud Density Lab

description.zh: 通过正交切片、等值面点云和梯度箭头查看三维标量场，并调节分辨率、密度与采样点位置。
description.en: Visualize a 3D scalar field through orthogonal slices, isosurface point clouds, gradient arrows, and adjustable sampling controls.

imageUrl: images/三维标量场_f_x_y_z_可调分辨率与点云密度实验台.png
